<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Change your password"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/auth/change-password"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Immediately invalidates every existing session token for the account.
Personal access tokens deliberately stay valid — revoke those
individually if needed.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
